message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.30 for durability program release

This release includes the complete mailbox durability program:
- Authoritative mailbox durability state machine (7 states, 31 transitions)
- Ephemeral-root classification with 4-tier detection and symlink resolution
- Forensic pre-recovery snapshots with /proc/locks parsing
- Archive anomaly scanner with duplicate/orphan/corruption detection
- Archive drift reporting (DB vs archive inventory comparison)
- Recovery admission control with single-flight guard and exponential backoff
- Deferred write queue with bounded backpressure and FIFO replay
- Owner-broker routing for degraded-state mutating operations
- Semantic-consistency gates for in-place repair safety
- Crash-safe recovery checkpoints with interrupted-attempt resume
- Warning flood caps with full artifact preservation
- Quarantine-only archive normalization (never deletion)
- ATC controller composition rules with timescale separation
- Deterministic test harness with seeded RNG and rerun breadcrumbs
- 5-pass code review with 13 bug fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
